title: Hiring Store Manager at Asian Paints Signature Store

jsonLd.title: Hiring Store Manager at Asian Paints Signature Store
jsonLd.description:
We at Asian Paints Signature Store are looking for an experienced Store Manager based out of Bhopal. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Asian Paints Signature Store:
Asian Paints Signature Store is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in KPI Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Learning & development budget
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Asian Paints Signature Store!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
